untranslatable_reason: Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom requires precise identification of: (1) lead-in phase trend line, (2) bump height measurement relative to lead-in height (2x ratio), (3) throwback occurrence, and (4) trend line from point A to B. These require multi-bar pattern recognition and geometric line calculations not supported by point-in-time indicators. The 2x height ratio comparison between two distinct pattern phases cannot be expressed with available indicator vocabulary.
